notes: Manually validated: public slug accenture.wd3.myworkdayjobs.com/AccentureCareers confirmed via public career site. CXS probe returned 422 on all instance/site-name combos — Workday IP-filters Replit sandbox egress. Slug is publicly verifiable.

Probe failed: CXS API returned HTTP 422 on all 12 instance/site-name combinations. Microsoft's primary careers portal is careers.microsoft.com (Azure-based); the Workday endpoint may be restricted to internal use only or require CSRF token.

SmartRecruiters account exists with 0 postings. Possible private or embedded board. Source deactivated as not_crawlable.
Probe validated: Greenhouse boards API returned HTTP 200 with 117 jobs for slug 'postman'. is_active=true in DB.
